author: Jdthomas24
description: Hubitat driver for Moonraker/Klipper 3D printers. Monitor print status, temperatures, and progress via live dashboard tiles. Start, pause, resume, and cancel prints directly from Hubitat or any automation rule. Supports Sonicpad multi-printer setups and standard Raspberry Pi/BTT installs.
releaseNotes: v1.0.47 - Eliminated redundant events/day across printers. healthStatus now only fires on state transitions. aaStatusTile uses fingerprint suppression — zero events at standby, ~100 per 10-hour print vs 1,200 previously. filesListTile suppressed when content unchanged. Fixed double setOnline() call per poll cycle.
